reviews.comment:
Paré para cargar nafta y de paso a tomar un cafecito en full. Resulta que cierran a las 18:00. Creo que no merece un solo comentario. Cada vez se achica más la atención al cliente.

(Translated by Google)
I stopped to fill up with gas and grab a coffee at Full. Turns out they close at 6:00 PM. I don't think it deserves a single comment. Customer service is getting worse and worse.
